title: Vanilla Boom
description: Vanilla Boom is a mod that aims to expand the vanilla experience. All blocks, items, mobs and structures that are added, are in the spirit of the vanilla game.
body:
# ![VanillaBoom logo](https://i.imgur.com/U9m5YfE.png)

**Vanilla Boom** is a mod that aims to expand the vanilla experience. All things that are added,
blocks, items, mobs and structures, are in the spirit of the vanilla game.

## Blocks

> `Bricks` Cobblestone, Mossy Cobblestone, Terracotta, Stained Terracotta, Magma Block, Snow and
> Obsidian.

> `Polished Blocks` Prismarine, Dark Prismarine, End Stone, Netherrack and Peridotite.

> `Pillars` Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Prismarine, Dark Prismarine, End Stone, Obsidian,
> Netherrack and Peridotite.

> `Storage Blocks` Charcoal, Sugar, Sugar Cane, Gunpowder, Blaze Powder, Magma Cream,
> Prismarine Crystal and all Dyes. Gunpowder Blocks explode when lit with a Flint And Steel or hit
> by a flaming arrow. Prismarine Crystal Block emits a small amount of light.

> `Red Nether Bricks` Cracked Red Nether Bricks, Chiseled Red Nether Bricks,
> Red Nether Brick Fence and Red Nether Brick Fence Gate. The recipes for fences have been changed
> to match the vanilla recipes for Wood Fences.

> `Soul Glass` Soul Sand and Soil can be smelted to make Soul Glass. This is a slightly more
> transparent version of glass. Can be crafted into Soul Glass Panes. Soul Glass can be crafted into
> Stained Soul Glass.

> `Gold and Copper Bars` Gold and Copper equivalent of Iron Bars. The Copper Bars have a normal,
> exposed, weathered and oxidized version and can be waxed to prevent oxidation.

> `Peridotite` Peridotite is a new type of stone variation that generates in large chunks around
> the world.

> `Hydro and Infernal Rock` Two types of different rocks that generate in Oceans and the Nether.

> `Bone and Wither Bone Sand` Two types of sand that generates in Soul Sand Valleys in the
> Nether.

> `Stairs, Slabs and Walls` Over 200 different Stairs, Slabs and Walls are added for all
> Minecraft and Vanilla Boom blocks that should have them.

> `Wood Variations` Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Crimson and Warped
> versions of Bookshelves and Ladders.

> `Fences and Fence Gates` All different wood types have their own Wood and Stripped Wood fences
> and fence gates added.

## Items

> `Wither Bone` The Wither Bone is a drop added when killing Wither Skeletons. The bone can be
> used to craft a Wither Bone Block, Wither Bone Meal or be used as a fuel in a Furnace to burn 6
> items.

> `Magma Brick` Used to craft Magma Brick Blocks. Can be obtained by smelting a Magma Block.

> `Polar Bear Fur and Meat` Polar Bear Fur is dropped by killing a Polar Bear and can be used to
> craft Leather, Books and Item Frames. Polar Bears also drop Polar Bear Meat which can be cooked
> and eaten.

> `Pine Cone` Pine Cones are dropped by decaying Spruce Leaves at a 2% drop rate. The item is
> edible and restores 1½ hunger.

> `Fried Egg` Eggs can be cooked in a Furnace or Campfire and restores 3 hunger.

> `Chocolate` Food item which can be crafted with Milk, Sugar and Cocoa Beans. Chocolate has a
> 50% chance of granting the player with Absorption for 10 seconds.

> `Pies` Three new pies are added: Apple Pie, Berry Pie and Monster Pie.

> `Cakes` Three new cake types are added: Chocolate Cake, Berry Cake and Carrot Cake.

> `Melon Popsicle` Food item which can be crafted with Melon, Ice and Sticks.

> `Soups` Three new soups are added: Meat Soup, Potato Soup and Fish Soup.

> `Drowned Flesh` Drowned drop this item which can be eaten and might give the player the Hunger
> and/or the Water Breathing effect for 30 seconds.

> `Prismarine Arrow` The Prismarine Arrow is perfect for underwater combat. Unlike a normal
> arrow, the Prismarine Arrow travels through the water as it would through air. It will also deal
> extra damage to Blazes, Striders and Magma Cubes.

## Mobs

> `Fishes` Four new fishes spawn in the world. Tunas in Oceans, Pikes and Perches in Rivers and
> Eels in Swamps. The fishes can be obtained in item form through fishing, Villager trading, or by
> scooping them up with a Bucket. ![Picture of Pikes](https://imgur.com/vLKgilI.png)

## Crops, Flowers and Farming

> `Trellis` Some crops added by Vanilla Boom such as the Tomato and Chili plant are two block tall
> crops. They need to grow around a Trellis which can be placed on Farmland.

> `Wither Bone Meal` Wither Bone Meal can be crafted from Wither Bones and can be used to
> fertilize nether crops such as Nether Warts. When interacting with Overworld plants Wither Bone
> Meal will have unique effects.
>
> - Turns Vines into Withered Vines which will no longer grow.
> - Turns Roses into Wither Roses.
> - Turns Grass and Ferns into Dead Bushes.

> `Tomato and Chili` Two block tall crops which need a Trellis to grow. When they are ripe they can
> be right-clicked to harvest their fruits. The seeds can be obtained through trading with Wandering
> Traders or by finding the crops in Villages. The Chili fruit will damage the player when eaten
> while also granting Fire Resistance for one minute.

> `Flowers` Roses, Peonies and Lilacs as a small flower can be obtained by shearing the large
> variants. The sheared bushes can have their flower's regrown by applying Bone Meal.

> ![Picture of Crops](https://imgur.com/91wwFfA.png)

## World Gen

> `Peridotite` Generates in large chunks similair to Granite, Diorite and Andesite.

> `Hydro Rock` Generates in disks in the Ocean floor.

> `Bone and Wither Bone Sand` Generates in small patches in Soul Sand Valleys.

> `Infernal Rock` Generates close to the lava level in the Nether.

> `Villages` Tomato, Chili and Rice crops generate in Village farms for the Plains, Desert and
> Savanna variants.

## Redstone

> `Rain Detector` A block similar to the Daylight Detector that will emit a redstone signal with
> different strengths depending on the weather. 0 for sunshine, 1 for rain and 2 for thunderstorms.

## Painting system

> To avoid the trial and error of placing and replacing Paintings to get the desired variants, the
> painting crafting system has been reworked. By using the Easel block, the painting variant of the
> player's choice can be selected and crafted. Each painting takes one to seven Dyes and a Canvas to
> craft. The Easel supports recipe lookup in JEI and custom Painting variant recipes can be added
> using data packs. The four paintings "Earth", "Wind", "Fire" and "Water" by Mojang is obtainable
> using the Easel. When placing a Painting crafted with an Easel the painting entity is modified to
> remember which item was used and the entity will drop the correct Painting item when broken.
> ![Picture of Easel](https://i.imgur.com/ZaKjNqe.png)

## Tweaks

> Polar Bears drop Polar Bear Fur and Raw Polar Bear Meat

> Wither Skeletons drop Wither Bones

> Drowned drop Drowned Flesh.

> Painting entities placed with the specific painting variant item will drop the correct item when
> broken.

> Sneaking + Right-clicking a Sticky Piston with an Axe removes the Slime Ball.

> Sneaking + Right-clicking on a Piston with a Slime Ball will turn the Piston into a Sticky Piston.

> Silverfishes drop Iron Nuggets at a 35 % drop rate

> Blaze Powder can be used as fuel in a Furnace

---

### Suggestions and Bugs

As a one-man team I am very open to help. Suggestions regarding what to add/fix next are very
welcome! Please leave a comment or contact me in through [Discord](https://discord.gg/n5a4aVx4). If
you find a bug or you think something is not working as it should, please report it here or in the
[Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Phrille/Vanilla-Boom/issues). Before you report anything, make
sure you're using the latest version of the mod and Forge/NeoForge.

### Links
